issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (When Attacking), not 'Activated'. 'Activated' implies a player choice separate from attacking; 'OnAttack' is the correct trigger for attack-triggered effects.
Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' not 'HasRestingDon'. The card requires DON!! attached to this card (−1 DON!!), not resting DON!! on the field.
Target should include 'maxCount':1 to represent 'up to 1'. Current structure uses 'maxCost' which is correct, but should clarify 'maxCount':1 for the 'up to' limitation on quantity.
